mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_chat_messages WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT * FROM ai_chat_messages WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT * FROM ai_chat_messages WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND role = #{role} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT * FROM ai_chat_messages WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_chat_messages WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}
SELECT * FROM ai_chat_messages WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
